title: [release-1.39] CVE-2025-49713 x/crypto v0.43.0, bump to Buildah v1.39.8
body:
Bump golang.org/x/crypto to v0.43.0 to fix
CVE-2025-49713

Fixes: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-134790, https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-134775

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

Changes look good, but the change that bumps the version number should probably be the most recent commit rather than the second of the four in this PR.

As an aside, the commit description for `[release-1.39] tests/run.bats: "run masks" test: accept "unreadable"` might as well mention that the list of locations it expects to find masked should exactly match the list in `github.com/containers/common/pkg/config.DefaultMaskedPaths`.

@nalind Thanks!  Yep, I want to circle back and move the version bump commit to the end and redo the changelogs.  I'll tweak the commit  as noted above.  I'll go work these same changes into 1.37 and 1.33 too.
